quote_exact: QL-01753,2025-08-22,MEEK2,MEEK2,parenting_time_restriction_or_denial,8,bf5f0364-c042-4e93-91cc-d633ca70fdc4.md,bf5f0364-c042-4e93-91cc-d633ca70fdc4.md,,167,md_upload_or_prior_extract,incarcerat;mental;suspend;unsafe,"**USER_ASSERTED:** Plaintiff’s job/housing disruption is a foreseeable consequence of repeated incarceration and litigation pressure, not proof of mental illness. “Could be” is speculative language and cannot substitute for findings based on competent evidence. Plaintiff denies being unsafe or unfit and denies that speculative “concern” meets any threshold to suspend parenting time.","Petitioner denies that this statement lawfully supports restricting or suspending parenting time and asserts the record omitted material facts and his evidence, including his efforts to maintain contact and lack of proven danger.","Require explicit on-the-record parenting-time findings under MCL 722.27a, including the clear-and-convincing endangerment standard where denial/restriction is imposed. Petitioner denies this statement as false, misleading, incomplete, or prejudicially framed. Petitioner denies that this statement lawfully supports restricting or suspending parenting time and asserts the record omitted material facts and his evidence, including his efforts to maintain contact and lack of proven danger. Require explicit on-the-record parenting-time findings under MCL 722.27a, including the clear-and-convincing endangerment standard where denial/restriction is imposed. Object if the order relies on hearsay, labels, or incomplete evidence rather than admissible proof."

For 329+ days, L.D.W. has had no contact whatsoever with Father — no visits, no phone calls, no video calls, no letters, no communication of any kind."" Petitioner denies this statement as false, misleading, incomplete, or prejudicially framed. Petitioner denies the PPO/contempt framing to the extent it recasts lawful or parenting-related communication as harassment/stalking without reliable proof. Petitioner affirms many allegations were narrative escalations tied to requests to see his son. Object to conclusory labels and accusation-driven findings absent competent, authenticated evidence (MRE 401-403, 602, 801-802, 901). Preserve hearing-right and due-process objections in PPO enforcement/modification contexts under MCR 3.707."
